data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data at rest and in transit are encrypted using industry-standard protocols.

data.title: Account Protection
data.description: Advanced security features to protect user accounts from unauthorized access.

data.title: Threat Detection and Response
data.description: Proactive monitoring and threat analysis to detect and respond to potential security incidents.

data.title: Security Audits and Penetration Testing
data.description: Regular security audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.

data.title: Advanced DDoS Mitigation
data.technical_spec: Anycast network, dynamic resource scaling, attack traffic filtering
